meta.name: Isha Patro
meta.title: Isha Patro
meta.description: Isha Patro — Financial Engineering graduate student at NYU, former SDE at J.P. Morgan. Quantitative research, machine learning, and software engineering.

items.desc: GPA 3.6 / 4.0 · Brooklyn, NY. Focused on quant research & ML for markets.

Project owner of Trade Activity Monitoring (TAM); reduced latency by 50% compared to the legacy app, directly improving trade execution and monitoring on the trading floor. Modernized the Mortgage Matrix tool to enhance performance in real-world MBS trading. Achieved a 12% reduction in latency and supported over $5B in annual trading volume, with growing impact.

Developed and enhanced the Trade Reporting and Compliance Engine (TRACE), improving data processing efficiency by ~30% and supporting timely, accurate regulatory reporting for trade operations. Implemented improvements to streamline data processing and reporting workflows, contributing to more efficient and compliant trade operations.
Built a JIRA ticket management app that enabled bulk creation and updates, reducing ticket handling time by ~70% and improving cross-team collaboration at J.P. Morgan.

Completed 156 credits with an overall CGPA of 8.8/10. Led the college DIY club and won 1st prize twice at the Engineering Clinics Expo — an Alexa-powered humanoid robot and the CG0R autonomous oil-spill cleanup buoy.

Designed wireframes and contributed to the full lifecycle of a responsive Appointment Scheduler website, focusing on user needs and goals. Prepared the website for integration with Chime and implemented best practices to ensure a seamless user experience and robust functionality.

Procured and analyzed data from diverse primary and secondary sources to extract insights contributing to a 15% increase in user engagement. Tracked Conversion, Retention, and Monetization metrics to provide a comprehensive analysis of business performance, supporting a 6% boost in revenue.
Extracted and analyzed large datasets; contributed to product strategies that improved feature adoption by 10% and increased active users by 18%.
Recognized as a meritorious student by the Government of Odisha — laptop award under the Biju Yuva Sashaktikaran Yojana for a 75% score in the CHSE Science stream.
Completed high school under the CBSE board with a CGPA of 9.6.

items.name: Implied Prepayment Surfaces via PINNs in Agency MBS Markets
items.desc: PINN-based inverse modeling to estimate market-implied CPR from TBA prices under the Hull–White PDE — +15% incremental return in backtests.

items.name: qutePandas
items.desc: Pandas-compatible execution layer backed by kdb+/q — 10×–100×+ speedups on large analytical workloads.

items.name: FinOKF: Typed Data Format and Certification Protocol for Trustworthy LLM Financial Reasoning
items.desc: Architecting a typed profile of the Open Knowledge Format with a certification layer whose soundness is mechanically proven in Lean 4, re-executing LLM-generated financial calculations in exact rational arithmetic, then stress-testing the system against 100+ adversarial attacks on real SEC EDGAR filing data.

items.name: Narrative Risk Allocation for Commodity Portfolios
items.desc: Engineering an end-to-end differentiable deep-learning portfolio allocator that embeds 125K+ financial news articles into volatility-spillover signals across 9 commodity futures, achieving a 1.73 Sharpe ratio over a 16-year walk-forward backtest.

items.name: Knowledge Graphs from Investopedia
items.desc: Financial knowledge graph extracted from Investopedia, integrated into Obsidian for interactive exploration.

items.name: VORTEX
items.desc: Architected a full-stack quantitative risk analytics platform: Gaussian HMM regime detection, 5-method VaR backtesting, XGBoost volatility forecasting, and a LangGraph multi-agent LLM system.

items.name: CryptoHedgeLab
items.desc: Engineered a high-performance crypto trading and backtesting system in C++ with kdb+/q, achieving microsecond-level execution, real-time hedging, and tick-level data storage for deterministic strategy evaluation.

items.name: Cross-Currency Dynamics in Cryptocurrencies under Stablecoin Regulation
items.desc: Analyzed cross-currency basis and liquidity fragmentation in crypto markets using high-frequency data across exchanges, evaluating stablecoin-driven pricing inefficiencies and regulatory impact (GENIUS Act)

items.name: Monte Carlo Pricing of European Barrier Options
items.desc: Developed a Monte Carlo engine under risk-neutral GBM to price path-dependent barrier options (Down-and-Out, Knock-In/Out), incorporating barrier monitoring and sensitivity analysis.

items.name: Advanced NASDAQ Market Prediction System with Deep Learning Optimization
items.desc: Engineered a sophisticated LSTM neural network system for high-frequency NASDAQ market prediction, achieving 26.7% improvement in forecasting accuracy through advanced hyperparameter optimization.

items.name: Portfolio Risk Stress Testing Dashboard
items.desc: A quantitative risk analytics terminal that empowers traders and investors to measure portfolio exposure, simulate market stress events, and quantify downside risk using institutional-level metrics and Monte Carlo scenario analysis.

items.name: Minted Wealth
items.desc: Developed a comprehensive financial intelligence dashboard integrating live market data, portfolio performance analytics, and net worth insights for smarter investment decisions.

items.name: Numerix Women in Finance Scholarship
items.desc: 2025 recipient of the prestigious Numerix Women in Finance Scholarship.

items.name: Cloud Generator — CG0R
items.desc: 1st Prize, Engineering Clinics Expo — autonomous floating buoy system for oil spill cleanup and cloud formation acceleration.

items.name: Humanoid Robot
items.desc: 1st Prize, Engineering Clinics Expo — biped robot powered by Alexa with custom skills, built on Raspberry Pi and Arduino.

items.name: Geometry of Intelligence
items.desc: Series decoding the math powering machine learning and deep learning.

items.name: A Better Way to Resample Macroeconomic Time Series
items.desc: A time-aware, decay-weighted forward-fill method for macro series.

items.name: Building Animated Globe Visualizations
items.desc: How I built the rotating globe visualization, step by step.

items.name: Breaking Down the 32nd Bond Price Format
items.desc: Demystifying the complexities of the 32nd bond price format.

items.name: Unlocking the Power of Obsidian Vaults with Python
items.desc: A simple guide to supercharge your note-taking.
